scripts.dev: concurrently -n shell,dashboard,cockpit,alert,incident,log,cmdb,notify,analytics,settings -c cyan,blue,magenta,red,yellow,green,white,gray,orange,pink "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/shell dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-dashboard dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-cockpit dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-alert dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-incident dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-log dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-cmdb dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-notify dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-analytics dev" "pnpm --filter @opsnexus/app-settings dev"
scripts.build:all: pnpm --filter './packages/**' build && pnpm --filter './app-*' build && pnpm --filter @opsnexus/shell build
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter './app-*' test && pnpm --filter @opsnexus/shell test && pnpm --filter @opsnexus/ui-kit test
